description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a widescreen display, encased in a sleek black frame. The front features a glossy screen bordered by a thin bezel, with a subtle brand logo at the bottom center. The rear panel is textured with horizontal lines and includes a larger brand logo embossed in the upper right corner, as well as a label and venting details. The monitor is supported by a round, glossy pedestal stand that connects to the back via a sturdy neck. The side views reveal the monitor's slim profile and the gentle curve of the stand. No ports or buttons are visible on the exterior surfaces in these views.
description: A slim, widescreen black computer monitor with a glossy screen, thin bezel, and round pedestal stand. Features brand logos on the front and rear, with a textured back panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glossy black screen, thin bezel, and a small brand logo at the bottom center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the monitor's slim profile and the curved neck connecting to the round base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the textured back panel, large embossed brand logo, and a label near the bottom left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again showing the thinness of the monitor and the round base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, black, and has a smooth, glossy finish with slightly rounded corners. It is visually unobtrusive and frames the display area with minimal thickness.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a circular pedestal base with a glossy black finish, connected to the monitor by a curved, sturdy neck. It appears fixed and does not show visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: A single button is implied at the bottom right of the front bezel, indicated by a small blue accent, but no other buttons are visible.
attribute_brand_logo: A small brand logo is present at the center of the bottom bezel on the front, and a larger embossed logo is visible on the upper right of the rear panel.
